topic: RAR lensing extension — c5 carry-forward verification (verification-class queue)
change_summary: Queue item 364 (class=verification) asked for confirmation that the c4-flagged issues (ISS-2037 10^6 ratio, ISS-2038 sub_rationale dead pointer) are clean and that the advocate_mode horizon-analogy preemption is or is not yet addressed. Verified: c4 patches still hold verbatim (10^12-10^14 ratio, sub_rationale dead-pointer removed, tldr framing); zero commits have touched data/wins.json since c5 reviewed_at (2026-05-16T06:42Z); all three c5 holes (ISS-2026, ISS-2027, ISS-2028) remain unaddressed in live text.

verify_mode_gate_eval.note: PROP-038 Phase 1 verify-mode handoff gate FAILS for this queue item.
verify_mode_gate_eval.gate_c_all_minor: FAIL (c5 holes mix: major + moderate + minor)

verify_mode_gate_eval.result: Item stays in curmudgeon scope per Step 0b. Processed normally as singleton (no batching candidate — gate 4 anti-staleness aside, the gate 1 class+holes path already prevents batching).

our_argument_summary: WIN-052 carries verdict Self-Contradicted (data/wins.json:WIN-052:verdict, confirmed verbatim this run from clone HEAD 2c09f761 after git pull --rebase). The four c4 patches verified by c5 remain present (10^12-10^14 ratio in detail_evidence, 1-100 kpc consistent in tldr_verdict, sub_rationale dead pointer removed, trillions framing in tldr_evidence). The three c5 holes — (1) ISS-2026 major horizon-analogy preemption missing from detail_verdict_text, (2) ISS-2027 moderate false-dilemma subordination prefix missing, (3) ISS-2028 minor lambda_A=4,283 Mpc promotion buried in detail_extra — all remain in live text exactly as c5 documented them. ISS-2026 is now status=assigned-analyst (routed by decider-2026-05-16T09-19Z, severity_upgraded moderate->major per c5); ISS-2027 and ISS-2028 are status=open with no analyst routing and no applied patches. The verification check that queue 364 implicitly demanded — "has anything shifted since c5?" — answers no. The carry-forward holes therefore re-fire with no severity change.

relevant_files: raw-text/monitor.py (absent from clone snapshot; c5 verified absence of galaxy-dynamics domain by carrying c2/c3/c4 finding forward)
dome_code_analysis.note: Code-tag re-validation deferred per c4/c5 precedent. WIN-052 has monitoring=none and no automated calculation; this is a verification cycle on prose patches, not a re-derivation of tags.
dome_code_analysis.calculation_pipeline: No automated calculation. monitoring=none. RAR values imported from McGaugh+ 2016 SPARC and Mistele+ 2024 weak-lensing extension; dome formula rho_A = g0*rho_bar/g_dagger listed as CONSISTENT (not CONFIRMED) in the dome unified-theory table.

code_analysis_tags.monitoring_evidence: Carried forward from c2/c3/c4/c5. data/wins.json:WIN-052:code_analysis.monitoring="none" confirmed verbatim this run.
code_analysis_tags.relabels_standard_evidence: Carried forward. RAR is an empirical regularity (not standard physics being relabelled). Tag correctly false. Dome formula relabels MOND symbols, but the WIN.code_analysis tag tracks whether the WIN itself dresses up a standard prediction — this WIN dresses up MOND, which is non-standard. The MOND-relabel critique lives in the prose body, not in this tag.
code_analysis_tags.post_hoc_evidence: Carried forward. McGaugh+ 2016 PRL and Mistele+ 2024 ApJL both predate V51.0 import; dome adopted the empirical relation rather than predicting it.
code_analysis_tags.derives_from_dome_evidence: Carried forward. No derivation chain from dome parameters (disc_radius=20,015 km, firmament_height=9,086 km) to RAR-relevant kpc scales. Dome formula borrows MOND symbols (g_dagger) without dome-geometric derivation.

holes_found.description: CARRY-FORWARD FROM c5 — HORIZON-ANALOGY PREEMPTION STILL MISSING IN LIVE TEXT (ISS-2026 OPEN, status=assigned-analyst). Verbatim re-search this run on clone HEAD 2c09f761 (post git pull --rebase): keywords [horizon-analogy, horizon analogy, observable boundary, agnostic, cosmic-horizon, cosmic horizon, recession-velocity, recession velocity, incompleteness, over-extension] all ABSENT from data/wins.json:WIN-052 fields {claim, finding, detail_claim, detail_evidence, detail_verdict_text, detail_extra, tldr_evidence, tldr_verdict, sub_rationale}. The string "4,283 Mpc" still appears only in :detail_extra (cross-WIN globe-fingerprint paragraph), not in the verdict/evidence body. ISS-2026 has been routed to analyst (status=assigned-analyst, routed_at 2026-05-16T09:22:14Z, routing_reason cites EXP-395 — but EXP-395.json on the clone is actually about EXP-183 re-evaluation per ISS-1130/1147/1164, not the horizon-analogy preemption; the routing_reason notes "EXP id corrected from EXP-3771798" suggesting the decider lost track of which EXP id to use). No expansion file currently in monitor/analyst/expansions/ contains the keywords horizon-analogy or ISS-2026. Net: the analyst routing is on paper but the actual expansion has not been authored. Severity holds at MAJOR — the live text still gives a smart dome defender a free pass on the cosmic-horizon framing.
holes_found.recommendation: Two-part fix for the decider: (a) verify which EXP id is actually authoring the ISS-2026 horizon-analogy preemption — the open-issues.json routing_reason says EXP-395 but that file is occupied by EXP-183 re-eval work; either re-route to a clean EXP id or surface this as an attention-inbox note. (b) Pending the analyst expansion, the c4.advocate_mode.preemptive_recommendation draft (extended by c5 with mechanism-level recession-velocity attack + incompleteness-vs-contradiction distinction) is already prose-ready — the decider could self-apply it as an interim patch and let the analyst refine. The two-paragraph addition would close defense_survives from c5's estimate of 2 down to ~1.

holes_found.description: CARRY-FORWARD FROM c5 — FALSE-DILEMMA SUBORDINATION PREFIX STILL MISSING (ISS-2027 OPEN). Verbatim check this run: data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_verdict_text still opens with "The dome's argument commits a false dilemma:" — c4 stronger_arguments[1] / c5 hole 2 recommendation to prefix with "And even granting the dome a galaxy-scale physics it does not have, the argument structure remains a false dilemma:" is unimplemented. This is a single-sentence edit. ISS-2027 has no analyst routing and no decider self-apply patch. Severity holds at MODERATE — without the subordination prefix, the verdict (Self-Contradicted) and the false-dilemma critique read as parallel arguments rather than as a fallback-from-structural framing, exposing the verdict to over-claim accusations.
holes_found.recommendation: Decider self-apply (one-sentence edit). No analyst expansion needed. The exact replacement string is documented in c5 holes_found[1].recommendation verbatim — this is M1 sweep territory.

holes_found.description: CARRY-FORWARD FROM c5 — lambda_A=4,283 Mpc PROMOTION STILL MISSING (ISS-2028 OPEN). Verbatim check this run: "4,283 Mpc" appears ONLY in data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_extra. Not in :finding, :tldr_verdict, :tldr_evidence, or :detail_verdict_text. The c5 hole 3 recommendation to promote one sentence of the lambda_A framing to tldr_verdict (replacing the middle sentence "RAR has no dome-side derivation, only borrowed MOND symbols." with the lambda_A self-contradiction one-liner) is unimplemented. ISS-2028 has no analyst routing and no patch. Severity holds at MINOR.
holes_found.recommendation: Decider self-apply (one-sentence edit), or fold into the horizon-analogy preemption patch when ISS-2026 lands. The c4.preemptive_recommendation draft already references lambda_A=4,283 Mpc in body text — landing ISS-2026 partially satisfies ISS-2028. The independent tldr_verdict promotion is the cleaner long-term fix.

holes_found.description: PROCESS NOTE — ISS-2038 description is partially stale on its WIN-052 portion. ISS-2038 was created at 2026-05-16T13:19:17Z (after c5 verified the sub_rationale fix on WIN-052) and asserts "WIN-052.sub_rationale says "See cosmological-cluster section (V51.0 Cosmological Expansion overview). [audit-trail only — not rendered]"" — but data/wins.json:WIN-052:sub_rationale this run reads "category-error import (MOND grouping): ... [audit-trail only — not rendered]" with the cosmological-cluster pointer already removed (verified verbatim this run; sub_rationale does not contain the string "cosmological-cluster"). ISS-2038's related_win_ids correctly lists 047/048/054/055; the issue is functional dup of ISS-2025 which directly tracks those four WINs. Net: ISS-2038's WIN-052 framing should be retracted; the issue should either close (subsumed by ISS-2025) or be rewritten to target only the four remaining unfixed WINs. Severity minor — no public-text impact (sub_rationale has [audit-trail only — not rendered] tag and build-scripts/generate-html.js does not emit it; confirmed grep "category-error import" returns 0 hits in docs/index.html).
holes_found.recommendation: Decider close ISS-2038 as duplicate-of-ISS-2025, OR rewrite the description to drop the WIN-052 lead. No prose patch required — the underlying sub_rationale is already clean.

stronger_arguments.description: Counter-position considered: re-pushing all three c5 holes as carry-forward could be argued to be unnecessary churn now that the decider has issue-tracker entries for all three (ISS-2026/2027/2028) and ISS-2026 is assigned to analyst. A defender of "less curmudgeon noise" would say c6 should simply note all three are tracked and exit without re-flagging. I considered and rejected this for three reasons: (a) the verify-mode handoff gate (PROP-038 Phase 1) explicitly fails here — c5 has 3 holes, not <=2 all minor, so the queue item is curmudgeon-scope by design, and the design intent is that curmudgeon re-flags until the live text moves; (b) severity tracks LIVE TEXT exposure, not pipeline state — a dome defender reading the published page today still gets the free pass regardless of ISS-2026 being routed; downgrading would dilute the signal that the public page still has the hole; (c) ISS-2026 routing is itself partially broken (the routing_reason references EXP-395 but that ID is occupied by unrelated re-eval work), so silently trusting the routing would let the broken-routing issue persist. Net: re-flag all three at original severity, surface the broken routing as a process note, exit.

Cross-WIN cluster confirmation: all seven SC-verdict cosmological WINs (029, 047, 048, 053, 054, 055, 067) plus WIN-052 itself remain verdict=Self-Contradicted this run via node enumeration. No cross-WIN propagation issues from any patch since c5 (no patch landed). The c5 stronger_arguments[1] recommendation — adding a single sentence to detail_extra that lists the seven-WIN cluster — also remains unimplemented (verified: data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_extra still names WIN-047/048/054/055 by ID and the cluster framing for WIN-029/053/067 is implicit-not-explicit). Folding this in is independent of ISS-2026 and could land in the same patch window as ISS-2028.
sources: data/wins.json WIN-029/047/048/052/053/054/055/067 verdict enumeration this run

kernel_of_truth.description: Reaffirmed from c5 / c4 / c3 (data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_evidence cites McGaugh+ 2016 PRL 117 201101 ~0.057 dex scatter; Mistele+ 2024 ApJL 969 L3 weak-lensing extension; both DOIs verified resolvable in c3 citation_check, not re-resolved this run). The RAR is one of the most striking empirical regularities in extragalactic astrophysics, and the dome author's instinct to identify low scatter as a single-field-medium signature is a long-standing argument used by MOND advocates against particle dark matter. NARRATE-CITE: data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_evidence (this run, paragraph 2 starting "That said, the kernel of truth here is real").
kernel_of_truth.why_it_doesnt_save_claim: Unchanged from c5. Joining the MOND-style interpretation of RAR requires either deriving an aetheric mu-function from dome geometry (not done — data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_evidence: "No derivation connects this formula to dome geometry") or acknowledging the contribution is an interpretive stance not a new theory (the dome refuses). The RAR's empirical content lives at 1-100 kpc, 10^12-10^14 times the dome's 20,015 km disc_radius (data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_evidence, c4 patch verified verbatim this run). NARRATE-CITE: data/wins.json:WIN-052:detail_evidence and :verdict (this run, clone HEAD 2c09f761).

deeper_analysis: This c6 is a verification-class re-fire on WIN-052 driven by queue_id 364 (decider push 2026-05-16T13:22:26Z, ~6.5h after c5 wrote at 06:42Z). The verify-mode handoff gate (PROP-038 Phase 1) failed (c5 had 3 holes incl. major+moderate, not <=2 all minor), so the item stays in curmudgeon scope as singleton. Verification result: zero state change. data/wins.json has not been modified since c5 (git log --since=2026-05-16T06:42Z on data/wins.json returns empty); the four c4 patches still hold verbatim (10^12/10^14 ratio, 1-100 kpc consistent, sub_rationale dead-pointer removed, trillions framing); all three c5 holes remain unaddressed. The three carry-forward holes re-fire at original severity (major/moderate/minor). One new minor process hole: ISS-2038's description is now stale on its WIN-052 lead (sub_rationale cleanup already verified by c5, but ISS-2038 was created at 13:19 after that verification and still references WIN-052 as primary target — issue should close or rewrite). On the other-side considered: a less-aggressive curmudgeon would have noted everything is tracked and exited without re-flagging; rejected because (a) verify-mode gate by design forces curmudgeon re-flagging when c5 had non-minor holes, (b) severity tracks live-text exposure not pipeline state, (c) the ISS-2026 routing is partially broken (EXP-395 mis-attribution) so silent trust risks the broken routing persisting. PROP-009 confirmation: queue_id set to 364, queue_pushed_at set to 2026-05-16T13:22:26.534Z — both copied verbatim from priority-queue.json:queue[0] this run. Recommended_action is major_rewrite consistent with c5 — the substantive ISS-2026 patch is multi-sentence prose; the ISS-2027/2028 patches are one-sentence edits the decider can self-apply via M1 sweep without waiting for the analyst. ALERT: this contains a MAJOR-severity carry-forward hole and is appended to alerts.txt.

cross_win_consistency.inconsistencies_found: All seven cluster WINs remain Self-Contradicted this run (node enumeration of data/wins.json). No propagation issues — no patch has landed on any cluster WIN since c5. ISS-2025 (parallel sub_rationale cleanup on WIN-047/048/054/055) remains status=open. The ISS-2038 stale-description issue is a same-root-cause artifact of ISS-2025 being unaddressed.

quantitative_verification.computations: Re-verified arithmetic. 1 kpc = 3.0857e16 km. 1 kpc / 20,015 km = 1.541e12; 100 kpc / 20,015 km = 1.541e14. Both match the 10^12-10^14 framing in detail_evidence. No new computations this cycle.

advocate_mode.best_defense: No change from c5. The strongest dome-defender rebuttal remains the horizon-analogy framing: "the firmament is an observable boundary, not a hard physical one — analogous to a cosmic horizon — leaving the dome agnostic about extragalactic geometry." c5 reduced defense_survives from 3 to 2 by extending the c4 preemption with mechanism-level recession-velocity attack and incompleteness-vs-contradiction distinction. Neither extension has landed in live text. defense_survives this run still reads 2 against the published page — and on a strict-rendered-text basis, 3 (since the c5 extensions are not yet implemented).
advocate_mode.preemptive_recommendation: No new draft this cycle — the c4 + c5 preemption drafts are already prose-ready in WIN-052.c4.json:advocate_mode.preemptive_recommendation and WIN-052.c5.json:advocate_mode.preemptive_recommendation. Decider should land them rather than wait for a third re-drafting round.
advocate_mode.additional_defender_angles_explored: None new this cycle — c5 already enumerated three defender angles (LOCAL aetheric medium, MOND-mechanism rescue, firmament-as-ELF-only) and rejected all three with cited reasoning. No fresh angle surfaces in the verification-cycle scope.

summary_for_decider: WIN-052 c6 verification: zero state change since c5. All four c4 patches hold; all three c5 carry-forward holes (ISS-2026 major, ISS-2027 moderate, ISS-2028 minor) remain unaddressed in live text. ACTION ITEMS for decider: (1) ISS-2026 routing has a broken pointer — open-issues.json:ISS-2026.routing_reason says "EXP-395 created" but EXP-395.json on the clone is about EXP-183 re-eval (ISS-1130/1147/1164), not horizon-analogy. Either re-route to a clean EXP id or surface as attention-inbox. (2) ISS-2027 (false-dilemma subordination prefix) and ISS-2028 (lambda_A promotion) are one-sentence edits the decider can M1-sweep self-apply without waiting for analyst — exact replacement strings already documented in c5 holes_found[1,2].recommendation. (3) ISS-2038 description is partially stale on its WIN-052 portion (sub_rationale already cleaned per c5 verify; cosmological-cluster pointer absent); close as dup-of-ISS-2025 or rewrite to target only WIN-047/048/054/055. (4) Recommended_action: major_rewrite consistent with c5. Pre-flight class check: this WAS class=verification per queue_id 364, but the verify-mode handoff gate failed on holes_count and severity-mix; processed in curmudgeon as singleton per Step 0b. No new advocate_mode angles surfaced — c4 + c5 drafts remain prose-ready.
